what_to_do_results.payload_task: Submit new employee addition to health insurance
what_to_do_results.task: Submit new employee addition to health insurance via the Endorsements tab
actual_steps: Step 1: Clicked Health in sidebar, then Endorsements under Group insurance
Step 2: Clicked 'New addition' button (purple, top-right)
Step 3: Landed on 'Who do you want to add to insurance?' page showing uninsured employees list with search and pagination
Step 4: Clicked 'Add to insurance policy' button for Martin Byrd
Step 5: Policy selection dialog appeared with radio buttons for 4 available plans across 3 insurers
Step 6: Selected 'BB Demo Account 1 OIC CAT B (SME)' and clicked Continue
Step 7: 3-step wizard loaded: (1) Required documents, (2) Member details, (3) Additional documents
Step 8: Step 1 shows document sections: Establishment, Insurance effective date, Visa Sponsor, Passport, Emirates ID, Visa, Change Status form
Step 9: Each section expandable with upload area and completion status indicators (Complete, Not complete, Attention required)
Step 10: Bottom buttons: Cancel, Save as draft, Continue
what_to_do_results.result: Full addition flow accessible and functional. 3-step wizard with document upload, AI verification, and save-as-draft capability confirmed.

what_to_do_results.payload_task: Assign already-insured member to existing health insurance policy
what_to_do_results.task: Checked 'Mark as already removed' and 'Mark as incorrect' options across endorsements views
actual_steps: Step 1: Navigated to Health > Endorsements > Removals tab
Step 2: Clicked 'View members' on offboarded alert banner
Step 3: Landed on 'Employees offboarded but still marked as insured' page
Step 4: Found 'Remove from policy' and 'Mark as already removed' buttons per employee
Step 5: Navigated to employee profile (Rana Tabbara) > Health Insurance tab
Step 6: Found 'Mark as incorrect' button (to rectify health insurance record) and 'Remove from policy' button
what_to_do_results.result: The 'Mark as already removed' button exists on the offboarded employees page (accessed via Removals tab alert banner > View members). The employee profile Health Insurance tab has a 'Mark as incorrect' button to rectify records. The New Addition page only shows uninsured employees. Already-insured employees are managed via their profile or the offboarded employees page.

what_to_do_results.payload_task: Track employee addition request status online
what_to_do_results.task: Track endorsement addition request status via the Additions tab
actual_steps: Step 1: Navigated to Health > Group insurance > Endorsements
Step 2: Additions tab is selected by default showing all addition requests across 6 pages
Step 3: Table displays: Name, Plan, Endorsement ref no., Submitted date, Effective date, Status, Actions
Step 4: Observed multiple statuses: Draft (with Continue/Delete actions), Under review (with Cancel action), Addition completed (with COI/Insurance card downloads), Cancelled (no actions)
Step 5: For completed additions (Rana Tabbara), COI and Insurance card download buttons are available
Step 6: Used search to find specific endorsement by member name 'Rana' - filtered correctly to 1 result
Step 7: Filters available by Status (Approved, Cancelled, Draft, Under Review, With Insurer), Submitted On date range, and Plan dropdown
what_to_do_results.result: Status tracking fully functional. All endorsement statuses visible in table with status-appropriate actions. Search filters results correctly. COI and Insurance card downloadable for completed additions.

what_to_do_results.task: Test the full removal flow via the Endorsements Removals tab
actual_steps: Step 1: Clicked Removals tab on Endorsements page
Step 2: Removals tab shows list of removal requests across 5 pages with alert banner about 2 offboarded employees
Step 3: Clicked 'New removal' button (purple, top-right)
Step 4: Landed on 'Who do you want to remove from insurance?' page showing employees with active policies
Step 5: Note at top: 'Need to remove a dependent? Go to an employee's profile, then tap dependents tab.'
Step 6: Clicked 'Remove from insurance policy' for Abhishek Sharma
Step 7: Removal form loaded with sections: Removal Date (required), Visa cancellation document, Insurance Card (Conditional), Anything else

Step 8: Expanded Removal Date section showing date picker and Reason for removal dropdown with 5 options (Transfer to a new policy, Termination, Resignation with notice, Resignation without notice, End of contract)
Step 9: Bottom buttons: Cancel, Save as draft, Submit removal request
Step 10: Clicked Cancel to exit without submitting
what_to_do_results.result: Full removal flow tested. Form includes Removal Date with reason dropdown (5 options), Visa cancellation document upload, conditional Insurance Card section, and free-text notes with file upload. Dependent removals are handled from employee profile's dependents tab, not from the main removal flow.

summary: Endorsements feature validation completed with deep exploration of both addition and removal flows. The feature is accessed via Health > Group insurance > Endorsements and provides Additions and Removals tabs. The addition flow walks through employee selection > policy selection > 3-step document wizard with AI verification. The removal flow collects removal date, reason (5 options), visa cancellation document, and optional insurance card return. Both flows support save-as-draft. Employee profile Health Insurance tab shows policy benefits, download card, Mark as incorrect, and Remove from policy. Offboarded employees page (accessible from Removals alert banner) offers Remove from policy and Mark as already removed. Workflow check confirmed no endorsement-specific workflow triggers exist among the 20 configured workflows. Status tracking works via table with status-appropriate actions (Continue/Delete for drafts, Cancel for under review, COI/Insurance card downloads for completed). Search and filters (Status, Submitted On, Plan) function correctly.
